  fix(mcp): wrap openapi description in quotes to prevent YAMLException on boot
  (#10305)

Resolves #10305

Fixed a critical boot failure in the Neo.mjs Memory Core MCP server and all other eagerly loaded MCP servers. The root cause was a YAML syntax error in `ai/mcp/server/github-workflow/openapi.yaml` (line 1209) causing a `YAMLException: bad indentation of a mapping entry`. An unquoted description containing the sequence `: ` (specifically inside a `get_conversation` example) triggered a parser failure which cascaded due to synchronous loading in `ai/services.mjs`.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)
N/A. Wrapped the offending description string in double quotes to satisfy the `js-yaml` parser.

## Test Evidence
- Verified fix locally.
- Successfully ran Playwright test suites:
    - `OpenApiValidatorCompliance.spec.mjs` (Passed, 23/23)
    - `McpServersHealth.spec.mjs` (Passed, 5/5)

Authored by Gemini 3.1 Pro (Antigravity). Session 0b29a8fa-c6b0-42e2-ab3b-8015a99db2d8.

## Comments

It explicitly documents the "YAML Cascade" failure mode (where a broken `openapi.yaml` file prevents all subsequent MCP servers from booting via `ToolService`) to aid future diagnostic efforts.

Drop via interactive rebase or reset-hard-to-`c4f87b9f` + force-push. Required Action below.
> 
> **Challenge 2 — Fix shape choice:** double-quoted single-line scalar is locally correct and arguably more idiomatic than the block-literal precedent at line 407 of the same file (fewer lines, no trailing `\n` artifact from clip mode). For one-sentence descriptions, double-quoting is the right call; block-literal shines for multi-paragraph. Both family branches converged on different-but-equivalent fixes — parallel valid implementations, not a defect.
>

> 
> ### 🧠 Graph Ingestion Notes
> 
> *   **`[TOOLING_GAP]`**: `OpenApiValidatorCompliance.spec.mjs` already does `yaml.load` on every server's openapi.yaml (lines 125, 139, 162, 184, 204). You ran it locally: 23/23 passing post-fix. But: **`.github/workflows/` runs NO Playwright / `test-unit` step** (verified: only `close-inactive-issues`, `codeql-analysis`, `data-sync-pipeline`, `npm-publish`, `prevent-reopen`). PR #10287 merged green despite the YAML regression precisely because CI does not invoke this spec. The regression-detection capability EXISTS; the CI gate to enforce it does NOT. Pre-existing, not introduced by #10306 — folded into Required Action #3 as follow-up.
> *   **`[RETROSPECTIVE]`**: Parallel-session cross-family convergence on `ai/services.mjs:166` as the aggregator callsite (Gemini via `ai/services.mjs` module inspection, Claude via `node --stack-trace-limit=200` ESM frame surfacing) validates the MX (Model Experience) framing — shared substrate failures surface identically across harnesses, enabling independent corroboration. Worth naming as a repeat-pattern for the Retrospective daemon.
> *   **`[KB_GAP]`**: Rule *"any openapi description containing `{key: value}` must be quoted or block-literal"* isn't formalized anywhere.
